name: Gall
description: Head 2 of a 2 Headed Hero, Gall is a powerful Mage stuck to Cho.
title: Twilight's Hammer Chieftain
info: Cho’gall is one of the most powerful, intelligent, and insane ogre-magi to have ever lived. As the leader of the Twilight's Hammer the two brothers seek to bring about an age of destruction... whenever they aren’t bickering that is.

Gall.name: Shadowflame
Gall.description: Deal 135 (+5% per level) damage to enemies in the area.

Gall.name: Dread Orb
Gall.description: Throw a bomb that will bounce three times, dealing 126 (+5% per level) damage to enemies.

Gall.name: Runic Blast
Gall.description: Detonate Cho's Rune Bomb, dealing 210 (+4% per level) damage around it.

Gall.name: Twisting Nether
Gall.description: After 1 second, nearby enemies are Slowed by 50% while Gall channels, up to 5 seconds. Activate to deal 353 (+5% per level) damage.

Gall.name: Shadow Bolt Volley
Gall.description: After 1 second, unleash 20 Shadow Bolts over 4 seconds, each dealing 87 (+4% per level) damage to the first target hit. The bolts fire towards your mouse.

Gall.name: Ogre Rage
Gall.description: Activate to increase Gall's damage by 25%, but reduce Cho's Armor by 25.  Passive: Gall is permanently immune to Stun and Silence effects.

Gall.name: Shove
Gall.description: Nudge Cho a small distance and grant him 25% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.

Gall.name: Eye of Kilrogg
Gall.description: Place an eye, granting vision of a large area around it for 45 seconds. The eye can be killed by enemies with 2 Basic Attacks. Stores up to 2 charges.

1.name: Keep Moving!
1.description: Increases the Movement Speed bonus of Shove by 10% and its duration by 2 seconds.

1.name: Taskmaster
1.description: Every time Cho is hit by a Hero Basic Attack, reduce the cooldown of Shove by 1 second.

1.name: We See You!
1.description: Eye of Kilrogg's cooldown is decreased by 25 seconds, its range is increased by 33%, and the number of Basic Attacks required to kill it is increased by 1.

4.name: Rising Dread
4.description: Each bounce of Dread Orb increases its radius by 25% and damage by 15%. Activate Dread Orb before the second bounce ends to reverse the direction of the third bounce.

4.name: Runic Persistence
4.description: Runic Blast deals an additional 180 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds in an area around the detonation point.

4.name: Bomb's Away
4.description: Quest: Damaging a Hero with Runic Blast increases its damage by 5, up to 200.  Reward: After damaging 20 Heroes, the range and speed of Cho's Rune Bomb is increased by 20%.

7.name: Edge of Madness
7.description: Every subsequent hit of Shadowflame against the same enemy Hero deals an additional 12% damage, to a maximum of 60%. These bonuses are lost if the Hero has not been hit for 7 seconds.

7.name: Double Trouble
7.description: Quest: If Shadowflame hits an enemy Hero that is afflicted by Cho's Consuming Blaze, its cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, Shadowflame's cooldown is instead permanently reduced by 0.5 seconds.

7.name: Ogre Rampage
7.description: Increase the damage bonus of Ogre Rage by 5%. Each time Gall damages an enemy Hero while Ogre Rage is active, this bonus increases by 1% for 4 seconds, up to an additional 10% bonus damage.

10.name: Shadow Bolt Volley
10.description: After 1 second, unleash 20 Shadow Bolts over 4 seconds, each dealing 87 (+4% per level) damage to the first target hit. The bolts fire towards your mouse.

10.name: Twisting Nether
10.description: After 1 second, nearby enemies are Slowed by 50% while Gall channels, up to 5 seconds. Activate to deal 353 (+5% per level) damage.

13.name: Searing Shadows
13.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Shadowflame take an additional 2% of their maximum Health as damage.

13.name: Psychotic Break
13.description: Increase Gall's damage to enemy Heroes by 10%. Upon dying, Gall gains Ogre Rage and can use Abilities for 10 seconds.

13.name: Twilight Nova
13.description: After the first bounce of Dread Orb, 2 extra bombs bounce to the sides once.

16.name: Leaden Orb
16.description: Dread Orb Stuns enemy Heroes for 0.75 seconds.

16.name: Deafening Blast
16.description: Runic Blast Silences enemy Heroes for 1.25 seconds.

16.name: Shadowsnare
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by your Basic Abilities are Slowed by 15% for 4 seconds. This effect can stack up to 2 times.

20.name: Shadowfury
20.description: Shadow Bolt Volley hits all enemies in its path.

20.name: Shifting Nether
20.description: Twisting Nether now teleports Cho to a targeted location before it begins Channeling.

20.name: The Will of Gall
20.description: Takedowns permanently increase the bonus of Ogre Rage by 2%.

20.name: Twilight Frenzy
20.description: Activate to reduce the cooldowns of Shadowflame and Dread Orb to 2 seconds for the next 6 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.GallBombsAwayTalent: Quest: Damaging a Hero with Runic Blast increases its damage by , up to .Reward: After damaging Heroes, the range and speed of Cho's Rune Bomb is increased by 20%.
tooltipMarkup.GallDeafeningBlast: Runic Blast Silences enemy Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallRunicBlastDeafeningBlastTalentSilence,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GallDoubleTroubleTalent: Quest: If Shadowflame hits an enemy Hero that is afflicted by Cho's Consuming Blaze, its cooldown is reduced by seconds.Reward: After hitting Heroes, Shadowflame's cooldown is instead permanently reduced by seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GallDreadOrb: Throw a bomb that will bounce three times, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GallDreadOrbImpactDamage01,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies.
tooltipMarkup.GallEdgeOfMadnessTalent: Every subsequent hit of Shadowflame against the same enemy Hero deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,GallShadowflameEdgeofMadnessTalentDamageAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> damage, to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,GallShadowflameEdgeofMadnessTalentDamageAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/>%</c>. These bonuses are lost if the Hero has not been hit for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallShadowflameEdgeofMadnessTalentDuration,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GallEyeofKilroggHotbar: Place an eye, granting vision of a large area around it for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ScoutingDroneTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. The eye can be killed by enemies with <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,ScoutingDrone,LifeMax"/></c> Basic Attacks. Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,GallTalentEyeOfKilrogg,Cost.Charge.CountMax"player="0"/></c> charges.
tooltipMarkup.GallKeepMoving: Increases the Movement Speed bonus of Shove by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,GallKeepMoving,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/>%</c> and its duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,GallKeepMoving,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GallLeadenOrb: Dread Orb Stuns enemy Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallDreadOrbLeadenOrbTalentStun,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GallOgreRageActivated: Activate to increase Gall's damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChoOgreRage,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]"player="0"/>%</c>, but reduce Cho's Armor by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoOgreHide,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"player="0"/></c>.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gall is permanently immune to Stun and Silence effects.
tooltipMarkup.GallOgreRampage: Increase the damage bonus of Ogre Rage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallOgreRageOgreRampageSpellpower,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*100"/>%</c>. Each time Gall damages an enemy Hero while Ogre Rage is active, this bonus increases by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,GallOgreRampageSpellPowerAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallOgreRageOgreRampageDurationBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,GallOgreRampageSpellPowerAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/>%</c> bonus damage.
tooltipMarkup.GallPsychoticBreakTalent: Increase Gall's damage to enemy Heroes by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>. Upon dying, Gall gains Ogre Rage and can use Abilities for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallPsychoticBreakDyingBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GallRisingDreadTalent: Each bounce of Dread Orb increases its radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,GallRisingDread,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Effect,GallDreadOrbImpactSearch01,AreaArray[0].Radius"player="0"/>%</c> and damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,GallDreadOrbImpactDamage02,MultiplicativeModifierArray[RisingDread].Modifier"/>%</c>. Activate Dread Orb before the second bounce ends to reverse the direction of the third bounce.
tooltipMarkup.GallRunicBlast: Detonate Cho's Rune Bomb, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GallRunicBlastImpactDamage,Amount"/></c> damage around it.
tooltipMarkup.GallRunicPersistenceTalent: Runic Blast deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GallRunicBlastRunicPersistenceTalentDamage,Amount*Effect,GallRunicBlastRunicPersistenceTalentPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GallRunicBlastRunicPersistenceTalentPersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,GallRunicBlastRunicPersistenceTalentPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/></c> seconds in an area around the detonation point.
tooltipMarkup.GallSearingShadows: Enemy Heroes hit by Shadowflame take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,GallShadowflameSearingShadowsTalentDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health as damage.
tooltipMarkup.GallShadowboltVolley: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,GallShadowboltVolley,CastIntroTime[0]"/></c> second, unleash <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="([d ref='Behavior,GallShadowboltVolleyCaster,Duration' player='0'/]*5)"/></c> Shadow Bolts over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallShadowboltVolleyCaster,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds, each dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GallShadowboltVolleyDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first target hit. The bolts fire towards your mouse.
tooltipMarkup.GallShadowboltVolleyShadowfuryTalent: Shadow Bolt Volley hits all enemies in its path.
tooltipMarkup.GallShadowflame: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GallShadowflameDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in the area.
tooltipMarkup.GallShadowsnare: Enemy Heroes hit by your Basic Abilities are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,GallShadowflameShadowsnareTalentSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>% </c>for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallShadowflameShadowsnareTalentSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds. This effect can stack up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallShadowflameShadowsnareTalentSlow,MaxStackCount"/></c> times.
tooltipMarkup.GallShiftingNether: Twisting Nether now teleports Cho to a targeted location before it begins Channeling.
tooltipMarkup.GallShoveHotbar: Nudge Cho a small distance and grant him <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,GallShoveMoveSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"player="0"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallShoveMoveSpeedBuff,Duration"player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GallTaskmaster: Every time Cho is hit by a Hero Basic Attack, reduce the cooldown of Shove by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,GallShoveTaskmasterTalentModifyGallCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.GallTheWillofGall: Takedowns permanently increase the bonus of Ogre Rage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GallTheWillofGallModifyTokenCount,Value*Effect,GallWillofGallModifyTokenPersistent,PeriodCount"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.GallTwilightFrenzy: Activate to reduce the cooldowns of Shadowflame and Dread Orb to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds for the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallTwilightFrenzyBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GallTwilightNovaTalent: After the first bounce of Dread Orb, <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> extra bombs bounce to the sides once.
tooltipMarkup.GallTwistingNether: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, nearby enemies are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallTwistingNetherSlowBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)"/>%</c> while Gall channels, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallTwistingNetherChannelingBehavior,Duration - Behavior,GallTwistingNetherFirstSecondLeadInBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds. Activate to deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GallTwistingNetherDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.GallWeSeeYou: Eye of Kilrogg's cooldown is decreased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,GallWeSeeYou,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds, its range is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Talent,GallWeSeeYou,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[3].Value/Abil,GallTalentEyeOfKilrogg,Range)" player="0"/>%</c>, and the number of Basic Attacks required to kill it is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c>.
